intentSynonyms: look up an issue in jira
fetch a single issue in jira
view one specific issue in jira
get an issue by id or key in jira
description: Get detailed information about a specific Jira issue by its ID or key.

issue_id_or_key.description: Issue ID or key to retrieve (e.g. ENG-123)

fields.description: Issue field names to include in the response

expand.description: Comma-separated list of fields to expand (e.g. changelog)
